title: On Living Too Long
content:
Is it not better at an early hour
In its calm cell to rest the weary head,
While birds are singing and while blooms the bower,
Than sit the fire out and go starv�d to bed?
meaning:
"On Living Too Long" is a quintessential example of Walter Savage Landor's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
